prompt: A staging environment has a flaky test suite: 200 tests, 15% fail on any given CI run, 100% pass when run individually in isolation. Diagnose the likely root causes of this test flakiness and provide a prioritized remediation plan with specific tooling and test pattern changes.
_note: Tests diagnostic depth: expects shared state / global mutable state as primary hypothesis, specific tools (test isolation libraries, DB transaction rollback per test), and ordered remediation steps.
